indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: No stove, oven, or microwave is visible, making it impossible to perform cooking tasks.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is essential for food preparation and kitchen hygiene.

indicators.name: hard flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring is not suitable for food preparation, as it can be difficult to clean and maintain.

indicators.name: absence of hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertop or hard washable work surface is present, which is required for all food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: high ceiling height
indicators.rationale: High ceiling height may make it difficult to reach certain areas while cooking.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking activities. There are no cooking appliances, no sink, and no hard prep surfaces, making it impossible to perform any cooking tasks. The high ceiling height and hard flooring also contribute to the unsuitability of the space for cooking.
